description: Caring for your garments to extend their useful life.

Lower temperature washes and delicate spin cycles are gentler on garments and help to protect the colour, shape and structure of the fabric.

Clothing Care Guide

icons.description: Machine wash at max. 30ºC/86ºF with short spin cycle

gemini_analysis.short_trend_summary: Wide-leg, light wash denim trousers are a versatile and comfortable staple for a relaxed, on-trend look.
These striped trousers feature a relaxed fit and pastel color palette, aligning with current casual and low-rise fashion trends.
This lightweight blouse combines delicate pintucks and ruffled cap sleeves with a subtle polka dot print, offering a romantic and versatile option for warm-weather styling.

gemini_analysis.short_trend_summary: This item represents the ongoing trend of relaxed-fit, wide-leg denim in a versatile white color.
This classic ribbed tank top is a versatile minimalist essential, reflecting the enduring appeal of foundational basics in modern wardrobes.
These cropped, wide-leg trousers in a pastel shade reflect a comfortable and relaxed casual trend.
These relaxed, cropped trousers with utility-inspired details align with current comfortable and functional fashion trends.
This romper features a draped neckline and a self-tie belt, embodying a relaxed yet chic aesthetic popular for warm weather.
This pastel relaxed-fit shirt with utility pockets embodies a casual and comfortable summer trend.

gemini_analysis.short_trend_summary: This romantic blouse with delicate lace details and puffed sleeves embodies a vintage-inspired elegance trend.
A relaxed, A-line midi dress with spaghetti straps and a tie-front gathered neckline, perfect for a casual summer bohemian look.
This wide-brimmed striped hat embodies a relaxed summer aesthetic, offering both style and sun protection.
This oversized faux leather bomber jacket with a high collar taps into the current trend of relaxed, edgy outerwear.
This cropped zip-up sweatshirt embodies the ongoing athleisure and casual comfort trend, offering a versatile layering piece.
